cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question and the passage. The question is asking: "A lot of figures are used in the text in order to ___." The answer choices are (A) record the valuable data, (B) provide concrete evidence, (C) introduce a research method, and (D) give a detailed description. First, I need to understand why the figures are being used in the passage. Let me go through the text again to see the context of the numbers. The passage starts by mentioning that in the past two decades, China has undergone economic reforms. Then, it says that researchers at the University of Missouri found about 30 percent of Chinese urban households now own at least one credit card and that the growth rate of credit card adoption has been an average of 40 percent per year between 2004 and 2009.
